Adds an obstacle for a selected set of coordinates, which sets the location as blocked.
addObstacle(int, int) - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
addObstacle(int, int) - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Adds an obstacle in the coordinates selected within the map grid.

Adds a station in the coordinates selected within the map grid.

Adds a single unit to the station, increments unit count by 1.

addUnit(int, UnitType) - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Adds a unit to the station.

Ambulance.java represents the police ambulance unit.

C

cancelIncident(int) - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
cancelIncident(int) - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Cancels an incident by its ID unless it has already been resolved or in progress.
CANCELLED - Enum constant in enum class cityrescue.enums.IncidentStatus
 
canHandle(IncidentType) - Method in class cityrescue.Ambulance
Determine the type of incident handled by the ambulance.
canHandle(IncidentType) - Method in class cityrescue.FireEngine
Determine the type of incident handled by the fire engine.
canHandle(IncidentType) - Method in class cityrescue.PoliceCar
Determine the type of incident handled by the police car
canHandle(IncidentType) - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Determines whether the unit can handle the incident in question.
CapacityExceededException - Exception in cityrescue.exceptions
Thrown when an operation would exceed a configured capacity/limit.
CapacityExceededException(String) - Constructor for exception cityrescue.exceptions.CapacityExceededException
 
CityMap - Class in cityrescue
CityMap.java represents the grid of the city, within boundaries and the respective obstacles when found.
CityMap(int, int) - Constructor for class cityrescue.CityMap
Constructs a city map with specified width and height.

CityRescueImpl.java is the main implementation of the CityRescue interface.

clearIncident() - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Clears the assigned incident from the unit

Decommissions a unit based on its ID.

Dispatches an available unit to the reported incident.

E

EN_ROUTE - Enum constant in enum class cityrescue.enums.UnitStatus
 
escalateIncident(int, int) - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
escalateIncident(int, int) - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Escalates the severity of the incident which must be between 1 and 5, and the incident must not be resolved or cancelled.

G

getAssignedUnitId() - Method in class cityrescue.Incident
Returns the ID of the unit associated with resolving the incident.
getCapacity() - Method in class cityrescue.Station
Returns the capacity of the station.
getGridSize() - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
getGridSize() - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Returns the current size of the city as an array [width, height]
getHeight() - Method in class cityrescue.CityMap
Returns the height of the city grid.
getHomeStationId() - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Returns the ID of the station the unit starts in
getId() - Method in class cityrescue.Incident
Returns the unique ID of an incident.
getId() - Method in class cityrescue.Station
Returns the identifier for the station
getId() - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Returns the identifier for the unit
getIncidentId() - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Returns the ID of the incident associated with the unit or -1 if no incident.
getIncidentIds() - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
getIncidentIds() - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Returns the IDs of the incidents in ascending order.
getName() - Method in class cityrescue.Station
Returns the name of the station
getSeverity() - Method in class cityrescue.Incident
Returns the severity of the incident.
getStationIds() - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
getStationIds() - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Returns the IDs of all the stations in ascending order.
getStatus() - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
getStatus() - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Returns the status of the city which includes the number of stations, units, incidents, obstacles, and the ticks.
getStatus() - Method in class cityrescue.Incident
Returns the status of the incident ("reported", "dispatched", "en-route", "resolved", "cancelled").
getStatus() - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Returns the status of the unit
getTicksToResolve(int) - Method in class cityrescue.Ambulance
Returns the number of ticks required to resolve a medical related incident depending on the severity.
getTicksToResolve(int) - Method in class cityrescue.FireEngine
Returns the number of ticks required to resolve a fire related incident depending on the severity.
getTicksToResolve(int) - Method in class cityrescue.PoliceCar
Returns the number of ticks required to resolve a crime related incident depending on the severity.
getTicksToResolve(int) - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Returns the number of ticks required to resolve an incident for a given severity level.
getType() - Method in class cityrescue.Incident
Returns the type of incident.
getType() - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Returns what type the unit is
getUnitCount() - Method in class cityrescue.Station
Returns current number of units assigned to that station.
getUnitIds() - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
getUnitIds() - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Returns all the IDs of the units in ascending order
getWidth() - Method in class cityrescue.CityMap
Returns the width of the city grid.
getWorkTicks() - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Returns the number of work ticks of a unit whilst at the incident
getX() - Method in class cityrescue.Incident
Returns the x coordinate of the incident location.
getX() - Method in class cityrescue.Station
Returns the x coordinate of the station's location
getX() - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Returns the x coordinate of the unit's location
getY() - Method in class cityrescue.Incident
Returns the y coordinate of the incident location.
getY() - Method in class cityrescue.Station
Returns the y coordinate of the station's location
getY() - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Returns the y coordinate of the unit's location

Incident.java represents an event which requires attention and response from rescue units.

Sets up an incident for the various incident types

IncidentType - Enum Class in cityrescue.enums
 
incrementWorkTicks() - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Increments work ticks for the unit tracking progress whilst the unit is resolving an incident.

R

removeObstacle(int, int) - Method in class cityrescue.CityMap
Removes an obstacle for a selected set of coordinates, which sets the location as unblocked.
removeObstacle(int, int) - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
removeObstacle(int, int) - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Removes an obstacle in the coordinates selected within the map grid.
removeStation(int) - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
removeStation(int) - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Removes a station's ID as long as it doesn't have any units assigned to it anymore.
removeUnit() - Method in class cityrescue.Station
Removes a single unit from the station, decreasing the unit count by 1.
REPORTED - Enum constant in enum class cityrescue.enums.IncidentStatus
 
reportIncident(IncidentType, int, int, int) - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
reportIncident(IncidentType, int, int, int) - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Reports an incident, including the type, the severity and the location.
resetWorkTicks() - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Resets work ticks to zero, whenever a unit starts resolving a new incident or is idle
RESOLVED - Enum constant in enum class cityrescue.enums.IncidentStatus

Assigns a unit to the incident.

Sets a capacity to the station to determine how many units can be stored in that station.

Sets the status of the incident to a new status.
setStatus(UnitStatus) - Method in class cityrescue.Unit
Sets the status of the unit

Sets a unit's status as out of service or idle.
Station - Class in cityrescue
Station.java symbolises a rescue station within the city.
Station(int, String, int, int) - Constructor for class cityrescue.Station
Constructs a station used to store units.
status - Variable in class cityrescue.Unit
 

T

tick() - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
tick() - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Introduces a tick system which keeps track of the time units spend at incident locations and solving them, updates the units status during, after an incident tracking their work progress in the meantime.
transferUnit(int, int) - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
transferUnit(int, int) - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Transfers a unit from current station to new station.
type - Variable in class cityrescue.Unit
 

U

Unit.java handles common unit behaviour shared by emergency vehicles.

V

Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.

Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.

Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class cityrescue.enums.IncidentStatus
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum class cityrescue.enums.IncidentType
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum class cityrescue.enums.UnitStatus

values() - Static method in enum class cityrescue.enums.UnitType

viewIncident(int) - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
viewIncident(int) - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Returns a string with the incident ID, the incident type, the severity, the location of the incident, the status of the incident and the unit ID to which the current incident is resolved by.
viewUnit(int) - Method in interface cityrescue.CityRescue
 
viewUnit(int) - Method in class cityrescue.CityRescueImpl
Returns a string with the unit ID, the unit type, the home station ID, the location of the unit, the status of the unit, the incident ID to which the current unit is responding and the work tick, which is only available if the unit is at the scene.

W

workTicks - Variable in class cityrescue.Unit

x - Variable in class cityrescue.Unit
